ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: The response shows understanding of the context and adherence to temple protocols but could improve in naturalness for a priestly persona.
baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>Short note: Lacks necessary caution regarding access, which is inconsistent with the ethical and guidance-oriented nature of a Temple Priest's persona.
